risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks in Lebanon are rated as 'High' and have remained consistently high since project approval, directly impacting project implementation capacity and sustainability.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance: Rating at Approval - High; Last Approved Rating (ISR Seq. 013 - 09 Feb 2024) - High; Proposed Rating - High

risk_summary: Macroeconomic risk has escalated from 'Moderate' at approval to 'High' as of the latest ISR, indicating severe economic conditions affecting project implementation in Lebanon.
evidence_quote: Macroeconomic: Rating at Approval - Moderate; Last Approved Rating (ISR Seq. 013 - 09 Feb 2024) - High; Proposed Rating - High

risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability has declined from 'Substantial' at approval to 'Moderate' in the latest rating, suggesting weakening government agency capacity to execute project activities.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability: Rating at Approval - Substantial; Last Approved Rating (ISR Seq. 013 - 09 Feb 2024) - Moderate; Proposed Rating - Moderate

risk_summary: Environment and Social Stakeholders risk has escalated from 'Moderate' at approval to 'Substantial' in the latest ISR, indicating emerging tensions or challenges with stakeholder engagement and social acceptance.
evidence_quote: Environment and Social Stakeholders: Rating at Approval - Moderate; Last Approved Rating (ISR Seq. 013 - 09 Feb 2024) - Substantial; Proposed Rating - Substantial
